nodes.title: Understand Task Fundamentals
nodes.description: Learn what the task involves, its purpose, and how it fits into the broader workflow. Review any existing documentation or guidelines.

nodes.title: Review Tools and Environment
nodes.description: Familiarize yourself with the tools, software, and systems needed to complete the task. Set up your workspace and accounts.

nodes.title: Learn Task Workflow Steps
nodes.description: Understand the sequential steps and process required to execute the task successfully. Document the workflow for reference.

nodes.title: Study Quality Standards
nodes.description: Review quality expectations, acceptance criteria, and any compliance requirements specific to this task.

nodes.title: Practice Core Techniques
nodes.description: Perform hands-on practice of the main techniques and procedures required in the task with guidance from documentation or mentor.

nodes.title: Review Common Errors
nodes.description: Learn about frequent mistakes, pitfalls, and edge cases encountered when performing this task to avoid them.

nodes.title: Complete Supervised Execution
nodes.description: Execute the task under observation with feedback from an experienced team member to validate competency.

nodes.title: Independent Task Execution
nodes.description: Successfully complete the task independently while maintaining quality standards and documenting any issues encountered.

nodes.title: Optimize and Document Process
nodes.description: Refine your approach for efficiency, identify improvements, and create or update documentation to help future employees learn this task.
